variant_0_0.note: Variant preserves unknown vulnerability with variable_renaming applied

variant_0_1.code:
// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT // L1
pragma solidity ^0.8.0; // L2

contract ProxyObf { // L3
    address private _b; // implementation at slot 1 (obfuscated) // L5
    address private _a; // admin at slot 0 (obfuscated) // L4

    fallback() external payable { // L10
        address impl = _b; // L11
        assembly { // L12
            calldatacopy(0, 0, calldatasize()) // L13
            let result := delegatecall(gas(), impl, 0, calldatasize(), 0, 0) // L14
            let size := returndatasize() // L15
            returndatacopy(0, 0, size) // L16
            switch result // L17
            case 0 { revert(0, size) } // L18
            default { return(0, size) } // L19
        } // L20
    } // L21

    constructor(address impl) { // L6
        _a = msg.sender; // admin = deployer // L7
        _b = impl; // implementation address // L8
    } // L9

    // Helper to change implementation (only admin) // L22
    function changeImpl(address newImpl) external { // L23
        require(msg.sender == _a, "not admin"); // L24
        _b = newImpl; // L25
    } // L26
}

contract ImplObf { // L27
    function ownerCall() external view returns (address) { // L32
        return owner; // L33
    } // L34

    address public owner; // slot 0 (overlaps with admin in Proxy!) // L28

    function setOwner(address newOwner) external { // L29
        owner = newOwner; // L30
    } // L31
}
variant_0_1.note: Variant preserves unknown vulnerability with code_reordering applied
